essence: Coordinates production schedules, capacity, and materials to meet delivery targets efficiently.

identity.title: Production Planner
identity.summary: Balances demand, capacity, and inventory to create realistic production plans and minimise bottlenecks.

salary.notes: Experience with complex supply chains and ERP systems increases earning potential.

qualifications: Experience in production planning and MRP/ERP systems
Understanding of capacity planning and lead times
Good communication with operations and procurement

lifestyle.description: Office and shop‑floor coordination role with frequent adjustments to plans as demand and supply conditions change.
